title: Trump threatens to 'decimate' Iran if it tries to kill him, as Treasury sanctions alleged Iranian financier
summary_full: Trump says 1,000 missiles are "locked and loaded" and will hit Iran if it carries out its threats to assassinate the U.S. president.
